name: jarvis
description: J.A.R.V.I.S — personal AI assistant (Iron Man style)
author: JARVIS

scripts.dev: node scripts/ensure-ai.js && concurrently -k -n BACK,FRONT -c cyan,magenta "npm run start:dev --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:quick: concurrently -k -n BACK,FRONT -c cyan,magenta "npm run start:dev --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build --prefix frontend && node scripts/copy-frontend.js && npm run ensure:backend-dev && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.build:desktop:pack: node scripts/bump-version.js && npm run build:desktop && npm prune --omit=dev --prefix backend && node scripts/prepare-desktop-pack.js && node scripts/rebuild-electron-native.js && node scripts/verify-native-pack.js
scripts.desktop:pack:dir: npm run build:desktop:pack && node scripts/pre-pack-release.js && npx electron-builder --dir --win --config electron-builder.json && node scripts/create-desktop-launcher.js && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.desktop:pack: npm run build:desktop:pack && node scripts/pre-pack-release.js && node scripts/pack-with-progress.js --win portable --config electron-builder.json && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.desktop:pack:setup: npm run build:desktop:pack && node scripts/pre-pack-release.js && node scripts/pack-with-progress.js --win nsis --config electron-builder.json && npm install --prefix backend
